title: Soulings
description: A fun spin on the graves concept: Ghost balloons!
body:
![Soulings logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27fa6d613456395f1146102793268fbff7ac38f7.png)

_The souling drifts, returning all your gifts._

Soulings is a small datapack made for Halloween that adds a new form of the graves concept. No more stones with your name on it, consider getting these little ghostly balloons to hold your items after death! They even have some variants depending on the way you died!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ojxqg5YPfcU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Disclaimer
Using the datapack version REQUIRES the resource pack, make sure you download and enable it before you play. You can find it by clicking in the version you want to download and scrolling down a bit. This isn't needed if you are using the mod version, as the resource pack is bundled with it.
